hotel_name: Căn hộ cao cấp Hampton Đà Nẵng (Hampton Danang Luxury Apartment)

reviews.title: DANANG
reviews.text: This apartment is the best I have ever lived in; aside from the location being a bit off, it truly has no shortcomings, and the decor and interior design are excellent.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Flexible (early check-in), clean, nice staff
reviews.negatives: Location (there is no nice cafes and restaurants near the hotel)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Sehr neue und ruhige saubere Apartment nette Betreiber wir werden wieder kommen.

reviews.title: Spotlessly clean and comfortable. Lovely natural light. Quiet area.
reviews.positives:
Spotlessly clean and comfortable. Lovely natural light. Quiet area. Good size fridge  etc . Almost Everything you need.
Food & Convenience shops mins to walk to 
Lovely staff.  Good check in with personal service.
reviews.negatives:
Cooking implements Supplied but no cutlery or crockery. Seems strange when it had a kitchette. Not even a cup.
Slightly further away from everything in general. But Grab made that ok.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room is a little bit bright in the morning, but everything else is nice and clean

reviews.title: The owners of this property are kind. Liked the location which is away from the tourist area!
reviews.positives: Property was fantastic and the staff were amazing. About 3 blocks from the beach.
reviews.negatives: Wish there was a couch in our room.

reviews.title: Great Stay. Will be back.
reviews.positives: Staff was amazing. Room was spacious and very clean.

reviews.title: Good for couples and for longer stay.
reviews.positives:
The apartments are new, very clean, and comfortable, with fresh towels and bedding, plus stylish large windows that give the space a really nice feel. Having a washer‑dryer and a spacious shower was a big convenience, especially for a longer stay. It’s a great place for couples and works well for anyone planning to stay a bit longer.

The location is about a 30‑minute walk from the city center, but the beach is just a short distance away, which is a big advantage. Taxis (Grab) are quite affordable, so getting around over longer distances isn’t an issue at all. The neighborhood itself is quiet and peaceful. 

I’d also highly recommend stopping by the nearby café Caline Coffee & Milktea — a lovely spot for a good coffee and smoothie.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Thanks for receptionist - helping us whatever needed ✨

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It's very comfortable small apartments. The house feels like a brand new building. There's clean, and you can find all basic stuff that you need. The location is peaceful within walkable distance to the beach
reviews.negatives:
Important note:
There are problems with hot water. It's only hot for 5 minutes, and then it's cold. If you're a couple, there's only enough water for one person—it's very inconvenient

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: One of the best places I have stayed in all of Vietnam! The apartment looks exactly like it does in the pictures and if you’ve traveled around Vietnam you know this usually isn’t the case. Very comfortable bed, shower has great water pressure and gets hot instantly, apartment is very clean and has all the amenities you would need. Quiet area and easy to get a good nights sleep. Staff are very friendly and the owner is very nice and helps with anything you need! Don’t hesitate to book if you’re looking for a great place in Da Nang
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Schön eingerichtetes Apartment in einer ruhigen Seitenstraße. Mit Waschmaschine/Trockner und Balkon.

reviews.title: Top Apartment für Da Nang
reviews.positives: Das Apartment war herrvorragend. Es ist exakt wie auf den Bildern und liefert einen grandiosen Aufenthalt in Da Nang. Ich kann dieses Apartment wirklich jeden empfehlen. Ich macht damit nichts falsch.
reviews.negatives: Das ist nichts negatives aber manchmal muss man mit dem Personal mit Hilfe eines Übersetzers kommunizieren. Ist aber allgemein sehr verbreitet in Vietnam. Also wirklich keine Kritik

reviews.title: Kurztrip Danang
reviews.positives: Sehr gute Ausstattung, Lage etwas abseits, dafür ruhig, super nettes Personal.

reviews.title: Location top!
reviews.positives: Struttura nuova, pulitissima  e a due passi dal mare

reviews.title: Geweldig!
reviews.positives: Ik heb een heerlijk verblijf gehad. Het appartement had alles om ervoor te zorgen dat ik een comfortabel verblijf had. Het appartement was schoon, het bed lag heerlijk, geweldige douche en ontzettend fijn om een eigen wasmachine met droogfunctie te hebben. Lee is een ontzettend fijne host, aardig en goede communicatie. Ik kom hier zeker terug, als ik weer naar Da Nang kom.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: 非常推薦
reviews.positives:
接待的小哥哥很親切
房間跟照片差不多 很舒適
房間內有洗衣機 小廚房 
周圍也有餐廳和超市
也有摩托車可以租借
雖然離市區有點小距離
但整體來說很喜歡🥰
reviews.negatives:
房內有紅色的大隻螞蟻
雖然不會咬人 但有點煩人會爬到床上🥲
早上周圍施工的聲音有點明顯

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: 老板和员工人非常好，服务细致。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
1.服务态度非常好，晚上下雨我们的摩托停在外面，第二天早上发现员工贴心的为我们盖上了防雨罩。
2.房东先生是一位非常年轻帅气的男孩，态度也非常的好，这一点也是满分💯
3.这个房型非常好，有阳台，还有洗衣机，晾衣区等等，非常适合家庭出行的人们。
4.卫生非常干净💯💯。
reviews.negatives: 无

reviews.title: 旅行佳选
reviews.positives: 环境优异 房东待人和善，房间内干净整洁 设施完善。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng cực kỳ sạch sẽ và mới, có bếp, tủ lạnh to, máy giặt, kể cả nước giặt,nhân viên hỗ trợ nhiệt tình, còn hỗ trợ check out trễ,

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời vì đặt chỗ tuyệt vời này
reviews.positives:
Phòng sạch sẽ thơm đầy đủ tiện nghi
Chủ home nhiệt tình vui vẻ
reviews.negatives: Không có điểm chê

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: rất tiện nghi mọi thứ đều sạch sẽ và xinh đẹp có hỗ trợ check in sớm, các bạn nhân viên thì rất nice và nhiệt tình lần sau có quay lại thì sẽ ưu tiên bên này

reviews.title: Красивые новые апартаменты. В тихом районе. Пеосонал очень любезен и помогает с любыми вопросами
reviews.positives: Новый номер, тихий район
reviews.negatives: Не хватает полочек или крючков в коридоре. И уборку чуть лучше. При заселении нашли волосы

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Супер стильный и удобный номер, персонал выше всяких похвал;

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Such a cozy place!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Прекрасное место! Очень уютно и чисто. Хорошее постельное белье и полотенца. Красивая посуда. Стиральная машина с сушкой как новая. Даже был стиральный порошок! Стильный интерьер. Хозяин очень приятный человек. Коммуникация была прекрасной. Отель расположен недалеко от пляжа в тихом месте. На первом этаже есть зонтики и дождевики для гостей. Нам было очень комфортно. Рекомендуем.

reviews.title: Все здорово! Мне понравилось! Осталось бы на подольше
reviews.positives: Интерьер! Новое все! Классный дорогой стильный дизайн
reviews.negatives: Далековато от тусовочных улиц;

reviews.title: Уютно, красиво. Обязательно вернулась бы сюда еще
reviews.positives: Проживали с мужем 6 ночей. Заезд был поздний, около 10, нас встретили. Предварительно списывались с отелем по вопросам, отвечали быстро. Номер очень красивый, новый. Есть все необходимое и даже больше. Много продуманных мелочей типа одноразовых бритв, буклет с информацией, два кондиционера, холодная вода в холодильнике. Улица тихая, рядом есть магазин с продуктами. В номере есть мини кухня, готовили завтраки. Удобно, что есть машинка и сушилка. На верхнем этаже есть патио, можно посидеть вечером.
reviews.negatives: Уборка раз в неделю. Мы жили 6 ночей. Из-за моря много песка. Хотелось бы либо уборку чаще либо средства для уборки

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Очень внимательный и милый персонал. Всегда были на связи в ватсап и помогали по всем вопросам. И хост и горничная очень приветливые и дружелюбные. 
Апартаменты новые и чистые, полностью соответствуют фотографиям. Район тихий и спокойный. Мы жили на втором этаже, спать никто не мешал, соседей также не было слышно. 
На крыше есть панорамная веранда, с красивым видом на 360 на весь дананг.  
Нам все очень понравилось проживание. Рекомендуем,

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Все было замечательно! Комфортный номер , чистый, вежливый и приветливый хозяин. Я даже продлевала прибывание , не хотелось уезжать )))
reviews.negatives: Соседи , которые внизу пели караоке, но это мелочь

reviews.title: Отлично!
reviews.positives:
Персонал очень дружелюбный, помогали, подсказывали, можно обратиться по любому вопросу. 
Сам номер очень чистый, стильно обставлен, вся мебель новая, полотенца чистые.  В номере есть все необходимое, даже стиральный порошок для машинки и вешалки, чтоб развесить белье после стирки, очень удобно. 
Тихий район в 3 минутах езды от центра, по ночам тихо и комфортно спать. Мне понравилось.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Kambarys buvo nepriekaištingai švarus ir puikiai atitiko aprašymą – modernus ir stilingas. Visi darbuotojai buvo mandagūs, paslaugūs ir rūpestingi. Tai užtikrino sklandžią ir malonią viešnagę.

reviews.title: Polecam!
reviews.positives: Obiekt jest nowy, czyściutki, nowocześnie urządzony. Miła i pomocna obsługa. Jest Netflix. Nie było problemów ze skróceniem rezerwacji z powodu kiepskiej pogody.
reviews.negatives: Daleko od centrum, ale za to blisko plaży.

reviews.title: Jó biztos vàlasztàs egy kellemes pihenèshez
reviews.positives: Csendes kis utcàban tàvol a nyüzsgô vàros zajàtòl, tàgas szoba, sajàt mosógép, konyhasarok, ùj modern letisztult berendezés
reviews.negatives: A pàrnàk nekünk tùl ducik voltak ezért kicsit kényelmetlenek voltak az alvàshoz.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The only positives are the modern clean renovation and a comfortable bed — and that’s where the advantages end
reviews.negatives:
My stay at this apart-hotel was extremely noisy and uncomfortable.
— One evening there was a very loud party from 6 PM to 11 PM; the bass was so strong it came through the closed windows, making it impossible to work or relax. (You can check videos on google maps)

— For the next THREE days, loud music played almost NONSTOP from 8 AM to 9 PM. I was sick at the time, and this constant noise made the stay especially difficult. (You can check videos on google maps)

I asked the manager to find out when it would end and whether it could end, but he told me that the ceremony would last 3-4 days only when I called in a rage on the 3rd morning. I begged him to tell me the truth before that so that I could understand how to make my plans for the day, but I didn't receive an answer until this morning.

— One night was disturbed  by a loud boiler humming from 12:30 AM to 3 AM, which made it hard to sleep.

— There are many barking dogs in the area, often heard even at night.

— There is construction outside, including on Sundays.

— The neighbors frequently sing karaoke, and during my 17-day stay I didn’t have a single quiet evening.

— The hot water runs out after about three minutes, which is extremely inconvenient — especially for women with long hair or anyone with a multi-step shower routine.

— The entrance to the building is always blocked by scooters, making it very difficult to enter or exit comfortably.

All these noises and inconveniences overlap, so there is very little quiet or comfort throughout the day. If you need silence to work or rest, this place is definitely not for you.

I really didn’t want to give a bad rating, but people deserve to know the truth and be prepared for all of this if they decide to stay here.

Update ❌: I was eventually moved to a quieter room, but I do not understand why this was not offered earlier, knowing that loud funeral ceremonies with music would take place outside for more than three days, from 8 a.m. to 9 p.m.

reviews.title: Disapointing
reviews.positives: Design of the room, clean
reviews.negatives:
Very thin walls, mattress, noisy with building sites around. You could hear neighbours who live next door making it a lot if noise since early hours 7am, one day got woken up by something which sounded like small hammer on our wall at 6am. We did not have a good sleep for a 5 days we have stayed there. 
Also there is not much hot water available, not for 2 people to have  a shower.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Everything is new
Street is relatively calm 
Staff friendly
reviews.negatives:
Only 1 minute of hot water 
Dogs barking all day long 
Nothing to dry the clothes 
Cannot wash clothes without being in the apartment as you have to leave the key to have electricity

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: It’s a clean, fully equipped, and very comfortable apartment. Very close to the beach. It felt like staying in a hotel because they clean every day if you’d like. i aldı liked spending time at the terrace with a view
reviews.negatives: Sometimes there can be construction noise, but I think this is a general issue throughout Da Nang.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The apartment is very well designed. The furniture is of a high quality and comfortable. The cleaner cleaned well every day. The staff seemed eager to help. The area is relaxing in the less built up area near the mountain. Great air conditioning.  The bathroom was very nice and the kitchen as well. Comfortable bed.
reviews.negatives: The room has the view listed as landmark, seaview and city. On the 4th floor it was just a city view. Very nice but not what was on the listing. Bikes have to be parked outside and there is no charging for an electric bike.  A little small for a studio. The shower gel and shampoo were really funky smelling. I used my own.

reviews.title: TLDR - Amazing property and host
reviews.positives:
I was absolutely enamoured by the property and the room! It was a pleasant surprise to find that the room looked just as good (if not, better) than the photos. They had only been open for a few months at the time of my stay thus a slight element of "risk" on my end, but upon arrival, all doubts went out the window. The building, facilities, amenities within the room, AND location did not disappoint in the slightest. 

Did I mention the host, Lee, was superb? Proactive and warm from the get-go and he went above and beyond for me. I had forgotten a piece of clothing when I checked out and was already en route to the airport before I received a text from Lee about it. He very kindly arranged to have it delivered to me at the airport where, I am ashamed to admit, I did not have leftover Vietnamese Dong on me to pay for it. Lee handled it and refused even when i offered to transfer the cost of delivery electronically.
reviews.negatives: Although I personally loved that the property is located at a quieter, more suburban part of town if you will, this is entirely subjective. If you prefer more people within the property to mingle with and the lively buzz of the city, you may enjoy the location a little less.

reviews.title: A comfortable stay in a local area near the beach
reviews.positives: Very clean and modern, newly built rooms. The bed was comfortable and the bathroom great. It was nice to have a washing machine in the room. The location was nice, not very noisy.

reviews.title: Feel like Home
reviews.positives: Very clean and spacious, definitely worthy for this price. They even have a 2-in-1 washer dryer! Love it!
reviews.negatives: It is very near to the beach, but is a bit of distance from the city centre, but this can be solved by ordering Grab

reviews.title: Feel like Home
reviews.positives: Very clean and spacious, definitely worthy for this price. They even have a 2-in-1 washer dryer! Love it!
reviews.negatives: It is very near to the beach, but is a bit of distance from the city centre, but this can be solved by ordering Grab

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing apartment. Super clean and comfortable. Great location.

reviews.title: Most comfortable and affordable place in Da Nang by a long shot
reviews.positives: Super comfortable place and bed. Everything perfect no comments
reviews.negatives: Nothing to complain

reviews.title: Supe clean and comfortable apartment, perfect for longer stays
reviews.positives: The apartment is new and has everything you might need including kitchen and washing machine. There is also a balcony with big see-through windows. Very clean and stylish. The location is easy to find. The staff was friendly and helped us to rent a motorbike.
reviews.negatives: It was a bit hard to understand each other during check-in process because the manager was not speaking english to good. But nothing that couldn’t be solved.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved our showers, washing machine and dryer and bed was comfy. Good amount of space and great fridge.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: We extended our stay to a month because we enjoyed the hotel so much

reviews.title: Clean, calm and modern stay for 1 month
reviews.positives: Everything was great! The staff, cleaning, location, amenities were wonderful. We stayed in a place that was full of mold prior so we were so thankful to the staff for providing a clean and welcoming place for our month in Da Nang.
reviews.negatives: The microwave would zap me from time to time 😅 the shower for the water was hot for about 5 minutes and would get cold but it wasn’t too much of an isssue (helps save water)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The apartments are excellent, and Ms. Linh provided exceptional administrative support. We appreciate the wonderful experience. The design is beautiful, and the apartment photos accurately represent the property
reviews.negatives: Construction is ongoing nearby. While this is a common urban issue and not directly adjacent to the hotel, occasional noise may be audible.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Seams newly built or renovated, very clean and well equipped (we mainly used the washing machine). The Bed was very comfortable, the staff friendly and the location was solid, close to the monkey mountain and not far from the Beach.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Peaceful and cozy room. Great.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.positives: The property is clean and quiet. Staff were helpful as well.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was great...

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
At last, a room that is better than the photos! A fantastic apartment, spotlessly clean, top quality furniture and fittings, a supremely comfortable bed, excellent bathroom, brand new automatic washing machine, a fully equipped kitchen, and clean sheets & towels on request. 
Highly recommended. 
Thanks to Mr. Leo and his team, I will see you next time I visit Da Nang.
reviews.negatives: Nothing, everything is perfect.

reviews.title: Five stars 🌟 🤩 ✨️ 💛 👌
reviews.positives: Beautifully furnished, very clean with fast internet.  Both the owner and manager are very welcoming.  I've already recommended this place to several people.  Highly recommend 👌 also has very good internet I work online 👏

reviews.title: Comfortable, affordable and spacious!
reviews.positives: I loved this stay!! It was very spacious and had everything you needed. This bed was by far the comfiest I’ve stayed in in all of Vietnam!! It was close to everything and the host was so friendly and helpful with extending our stay!! He also responded very quickly which was amazing!! Would definitely recommend 😊
reviews.negatives: Nothing it was a perfect stay for a few days in Da Nang!

reviews.title: It's the cleanest, and "luxury" new place I've stayed in Da Nang
reviews.positives: Very nice stay and great value for the price. The apartment is virtually brand new. All the fixtures are top quality. Had a great view of the mountain. The bed was one of the most comfortable I've ever slept in. Lee, the manager, is very nice and speaks good English. Highly recommend.
reviews.negatives: If I were being picky, the location is Son Tra, which is near the top, past the MyAnn area. But you could look at this as a positive because it's a quiet area. I also have a scooter, so it was fine for me.

reviews.title: Modern, clean, safe, great for solo female travelers.
reviews.positives: One of the best places to stay in Da Nang I have ever booked. It looks like the photos, all new, hot water that lasts a while, strong WiFi, and really clean. Host was really responsive and a good place for longer stays.
reviews.negatives:
For tourists, they may be a bit far from main things, but grab rides are easy and cheap.

The plot across the street is filled with trash and isn’t something to look at. 

There is also a strange order in the apartment that I am not sure where it came from but an air freshener helped.

It’s a bit expensive for the area, but would stay again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I really enjoyed these apartments! Everything is brand new and perfectly clean, the neighborhood is quiet and peaceful -an ideal place to escape from the hustle and bustle of the city. The hosts are wonderful, kind, and welcoming people. Thank you for your excellent service
